untranslatable_reason: CCI (Commodity Channel Index) is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The source paper does not disclose specific CCI thresholds or entry/exit logic. Signal description states 'specific threshold not disclosed' and 'exit conditions not explicitly specified.' Substituted ADX as a trend-confirmation proxy, but this does not accurately represent the original CCI-based system.
translation_notes: Original signal requires CCI indicator which is unavailable. Paper claims 232% annual return and 63.25% strike rate over 10 years on NIFTY options with both long and short positions in trending conditions. Without CCI thresholds and explicit exit rules, accurate reconstruction is impossible. Used ADX > 25 (strong trend) as entry filter and ADX < 20 (trend weakening) as exit as a reasonable but approximate substitute. Recommend obtaining the original paper (SSRN_3323746) for precise CCI parameters.
